task.summary: Default task
create develop
create develop
backend auth
feat(auth): scaffold authentication module with controllers, services, JWT strategy, guard, and DTOs

feat(users): scaffold Users module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created users.module.ts to define the Users module - Added controllers/users.controller.ts to handle user-related HTTP requests and route definitions - Added services/users.service.ts to encapsulate business logic related to users - Created dto directory for user-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) to validate and type-check user input and output - The structure prepares the foundation for implementing user CRUD operations, profile management, and related features in future commits

feat(users): scaffold Users module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created users.module.ts to define the Users module - Added controllers/users.controller.ts to handle user-related HTTP requests and route definitions - Added services/users.service.ts to encapsulate business logic related to users - Created dto directory for user-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) to validate and type-check user input and output - The structure prepares the foundation for implementing user CRUD operations, profile management, and related features in future commits

feat(murmurs): scaffold Murmurs module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created murmurs.module.ts to register and configure the Murmurs module - Added controllers/murmurs.controller.ts to handle HTTP routes for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting murmurs (posts) - Added services/murmurs.service.ts to encapsulate business logic for murmur operations - Created dto/ directory for murmur-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) such as create-murmur.dto.ts and update-murmur.dto.ts to validate and type-check input/output data - Established a foundation for implementing murmur CRUD functionality and future features such as post visibility, attachments, or interactions
added entities

feat(notifications): scaffold Notifications module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created notifications.module.ts to register and configure the Notifications module - Added controllers/notifications.controller.ts for handling notification-related HTTP routes (e.g., fetching, marking as read) - Added services/notifications.service.ts to encapsulate business logic for notifications (creation, delivery, updates) - Created dto/ directory for notification-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) such as create-notification.dto.ts and update-notification.dto.ts to validate and type-check input/output data - Established a foundation for implementing notification CRUD functionality and future features such as user alerts, unread counts, and notification preferences
updated full app structures and added test cases
updated full app structures and added test cases
added api configurations
added api configurations

feat(auth): implement authentication module with login, registration, and JWT
- Added authentication module with controller and service for handling user login and registration - Integrated JWT-based authentication for secure session management - Added DTOs for login and registration requests - Implemented middleware/guard to protect authenticated routes - Provided error handling for invalid credentials and registration conflicts - Prepared for future enhancements such as password reset and email verification

feat(nav): add navigation bar with protected routes and language context support
- Implemented a responsive navigation bar (Nav) component for global navigation - Added route protection to restrict access to authenticated-only pages, using a ProtectedRoute component/hook - Navigation bar dynamically updates based on authentication state (shows login/register for guests, user menu for logged-in users) - Integrated language context (i18n) to allow switching and displaying the app in multiple languages - Updated navigation links and labels to use translation keys for seamless language switching - Responsive design with mobile and desktop support - Prepared for future enhancements like notification badges and user avatar dropdowns in the nav

feat(timeline): implement timeline/feed feature for displaying murmurs
- Added Timeline component to fetch and display a list of murmurs in chronological order - Integrated infinite scroll or pagination for efficient feed loading - Incorporated loading states and error handling for better UX - Enabled interactions on murmurs (like, comment, view author profile) - Timeline updates dynamically when new murmurs are posted - Responsive design for mobile and desktop views - Prepared for future enhancements such as filtering, sorting, and real-time updates

feat(profile): implement user profile view and edit functionality
- Added Profile component to display user information such as username, bio, avatar, and stats - Implemented edit profile modal/form for updating user details - Integrated profile API calls for fetching and updating user data - Responsive design for both desktop and mobile views - Handled loading states, errors, and form validation - Profile page supports viewing other users' profiles and own profile with edit options - Prepared for future enhancements like displaying followers, following lists, and user’s murmurs

feat(discover): implement discover page for exploring users and trending murmurs
- Added Discover component/page to highlight trending murmurs and suggest users to follow - Integrated API calls for fetching popular murmurs, new users, and recommendations - Included follow/unfollow actions directly from the Discover page - Responsive layout for both desktop and mobile views - Incorporated loading states, error handling, and empty state messaging - Prepared for future enhancements such as category filters, search, and personalized recommendations
updated app.tsx
updated app.tsx

feat(search): enable user-only search functionality
- Added Search component/page to allow searching users by username or name - Integrated API call to fetch users matching the search query - Displayed user search results with links to their profiles - Included responsive design, loading states, error handling, and empty result messaging - Prepared for future enhancements such as search suggestions and filters

feat(frontend): full check and update with notifications, user search, language context, and UI enhancements
- Implemented follower update notifications, including unread/read states and real-time updates (polling/WebSocket) - Added notifications center/component for displaying updates from followed users - Integrated API calls for notifications and user search - Search functionality now allows searching users by username or name - Profile page supports view/edit and includes FollowListModal for followers/following - Added Discover page for exploring new users and trending murmurs - MurmurDetails page for full murmur view, interactions, and comments - Updated App.tsx to include language (i18n) context provider for multi-language support - Responsive design improvements across all major components - Handled loading, error, and empty states throughout the UI - Codebase prepared for future enhancements like push notifications, notification settings, and more search filters

MESSAGE.value: feat(auth): scaffold authentication module with controllers, services, JWT strategy, guard, and DTOs

feat(users): scaffold Users module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created users.module.ts to define the Users module - Added controllers/users.controller.ts to handle user-related HTTP requests and route definitions - Added services/users.service.ts to encapsulate business logic related to users - Created dto directory for user-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) to validate and type-check user input and output - The structure prepares the foundation for implementing user CRUD operations, profile management, and related features in future commits

feat(murmurs): scaffold Murmurs module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created murmurs.module.ts to register and configure the Murmurs module - Added controllers/murmurs.controller.ts to handle HTTP routes for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting murmurs (posts) - Added services/murmurs.service.ts to encapsulate business logic for murmur operations - Created dto/ directory for murmur-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) such as create-murmur.dto.ts and update-murmur.dto.ts to validate and type-check input/output data - Established a foundation for implementing murmur CRUD functionality and future features such as post visibility, attachments, or interactions

feat(notifications): scaffold Notifications module with controller, service, and DTOs
- Created notifications.module.ts to register and configure the Notifications module - Added controllers/notifications.controller.ts for handling notification-related HTTP routes (e.g., fetching, marking as read) - Added services/notifications.service.ts to encapsulate business logic for notifications (creation, delivery, updates) - Created dto/ directory for notification-related Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) such as create-notification.dto.ts and update-notification.dto.ts to validate and type-check input/output data - Established a foundation for implementing notification CRUD functionality and future features such as user alerts, unread counts, and notification preferences
updated full app structures and added test cases

feat(auth): implement authentication module with login, registration, and JWT
- Added authentication module with controller and service for handling user login and registration - Integrated JWT-based authentication for secure session management - Added DTOs for login and registration requests - Implemented middleware/guard to protect authenticated routes - Provided error handling for invalid credentials and registration conflicts - Prepared for future enhancements such as password reset and email verification

feat(nav): add navigation bar with protected routes and language context support
- Implemented a responsive navigation bar (Nav) component for global navigation - Added route protection to restrict access to authenticated-only pages, using a ProtectedRoute component/hook - Navigation bar dynamically updates based on authentication state (shows login/register for guests, user menu for logged-in users) - Integrated language context (i18n) to allow switching and displaying the app in multiple languages - Updated navigation links and labels to use translation keys for seamless language switching - Responsive design with mobile and desktop support - Prepared for future enhancements like notification badges and user avatar dropdowns in the nav

feat(timeline): implement timeline/feed feature for displaying murmurs
- Added Timeline component to fetch and display a list of murmurs in chronological order - Integrated infinite scroll or pagination for efficient feed loading - Incorporated loading states and error handling for better UX - Enabled interactions on murmurs (like, comment, view author profile) - Timeline updates dynamically when new murmurs are posted - Responsive design for mobile and desktop views - Prepared for future enhancements such as filtering, sorting, and real-time updates

feat(profile): implement user profile view and edit functionality
- Added Profile component to display user information such as username, bio, avatar, and stats - Implemented edit profile modal/form for updating user details - Integrated profile API calls for fetching and updating user data - Responsive design for both desktop and mobile views - Handled loading states, errors, and form validation - Profile page supports viewing other users' profiles and own profile with edit options - Prepared for future enhancements like displaying followers, following lists, and user’s murmurs

feat(discover): implement discover page for exploring users and trending murmurs
- Added Discover component/page to highlight trending murmurs and suggest users to follow - Integrated API calls for fetching popular murmurs, new users, and recommendations - Included follow/unfollow actions directly from the Discover page - Responsive layout for both desktop and mobile views - Incorporated loading states, error handling, and empty state messaging - Prepared for future enhancements such as category filters, search, and personalized recommendations

feat(search): enable user-only search functionality
- Added Search component/page to allow searching users by username or name - Integrated API call to fetch users matching the search query - Displayed user search results with links to their profiles - Included responsive design, loading states, error handling, and empty result messaging - Prepared for future enhancements such as search suggestions and filters

feat(frontend): full check and update with notifications, user search, language context, and UI enhancements
- Implemented follower update notifications, including unread/read states and real-time updates (polling/WebSocket) - Added notifications center/component for displaying updates from followed users - Integrated API calls for notifications and user search - Search functionality now allows searching users by username or name - Profile page supports view/edit and includes FollowListModal for followers/following - Added Discover page for exploring new users and trending murmurs - MurmurDetails page for full murmur view, interactions, and comments - Updated App.tsx to include language (i18n) context provider for multi-language support - Responsive design improvements across all major components - Handled loading, error, and empty states throughout the UI - Codebase prepared for future enhancements like push notifications, notification settings, and more search filters

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(frontend): full check and update with notifications, user search, language context, and UI enhancements
- Implemented follower update notifications, including unread/read states and real-time updates (polling/WebSocket) - Added notifications center/component for displaying updates from followed users - Integrated API calls for notifications and user search - Search functionality now allows searching users by username or name - Profile page supports view/edit and includes FollowListModal for followers/following - Added Discover page for exploring new users and trending murmurs - MurmurDetails page for full murmur view, interactions, and comments - Updated App.tsx to include language (i18n) context provider for multi-language support - Responsive design improvements across all major components - Handled loading, error, and empty states throughout the UI - Codebase prepared for future enhancements like push notifications, notification settings, and more search filters
